name: pitch-deck
description: Create a compelling 10-slide startup pitch deck outline with slide titles, key messages, supporting data points, and presenter talking points.
input_description: Startup name, one-line description, problem being solved, solution, target market, business model, traction to date, team, and funding ask.
output_description: 10-slide pitch deck outline in Markdown with slide number, title, bullet-point content for each slide, and speaker notes — covering Problem, Solution, Market, Product, Traction, Business Model, Team, Competition, Financials, and Ask.
